## What's missing in v1

Check the [v2 standard](../../skills/CHECKLIST.md#v2-standard-the-deepening-target). My skill is missing:

- [ ] Hard Constraints section
- [ ] Workflow Overview (ASCII)
- [ ] Numbered step-by-step
- [ ] Required Output Format with tables
- [ ] Worked Example
- [ ] Common Mistakes (extensive)
- [ ] Notes on Tooling
- [ ] Quick Reference
